## Summary

What does this pull request change?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Other

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run tauri build` (Windows only, if applicable)

## Security / Privacy Check

- [ ] No tokens, cookies, auth files, `.env`, or personal paths were added
- [ ] Logs and examples use sanitized or mock data

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes, if any.
